detaileddescription.para: print a message the the log stream with a preceding @ character. by default the log stream is cout. used for printing the signature of a function (see the arma_extra_debug_sigprint macro)

memberdef.argsstring: (const T1 &x)
memberdef.name: arma_stop

briefdescription.para: print a message to get_stream_err1() and/or throw a logic_error exception
